tiers.label: Tier 1
tiers.description: Best balanced options across accuracy, processing speed, and cost efficiency.

tiers.label: Tier 2
tiers.description: Middle options that miss Tier 1 but may have a specific accuracy, speed, or cost advantage.

tiers.label: Tier 3
tiers.description: Lowest balanced options, generally weaker across the combined benchmark categories.

notes: Best overall provider: `gcloud/standard` scored 74.47/100 using balanced overall weighting.
Worst overall provider: `minimax/speech-2.8-turbo` scored 42.85/100 using balanced overall weighting.
The cheapest cloud provider was `gemini/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts` at 0.0143¢ ($0.0001).

No roundtrip STT data was available. Existing local/cloud ranking used a composite of speaking rate naturalness (60%), cost (20%), and speed (20%); overall ranking used neutral 50/100 accuracy components for providers without roundtrip data.
